title: Open the workflow viewer for a selected issue
description: This verifies that a user can open an issue from the all-work list, launch the workflow viewer from the status popover, and see the workflow diagram for that issue.

steps.description: Verify the workflow diagram is displayed
Verify the current status is highlighted in the workflow view

title: Show the workflow for a deep-linked issue
description: This verifies that opening a deep-linked issue in the all-work view allows the user to access the correct issue’s workflow diagram.

steps.description: Verify the workflow diagram is displayed for the opened issue
Verify the current status highlight matches the selected issue

title: Close the workflow viewer modal
description: This verifies that a user can dismiss the workflow viewer after opening it from an issue detail panel.

steps.description: Verify the workflow viewer modal is no longer displayed

title: Handle an issue type with no workflow data
description: This verifies that the workflow viewer does not break when an issue has no available workflow data and shows an empty or guarded state instead.

steps.description: Click a work item row for an issue with no workflow data
Verify a guarded empty state is displayed
Verify no workflow diagram is shown
